scripts.start: npm run schema && rebuild -w src/common -w src/backend --output build --transform 'src/*/{!(node_modules),node_modules/common}/**/*.{js,mjs}' --using scripts/transformer.js --fork build/backend/src/start.js -k 4000 -k 5555
scripts.start-web: concurrently 'cd src/web-index && npm start' 'cd src/web-places && npm start'
scripts.start-ssr: npm run build-web-local && cross-env USE_LOCALCAN=true rebuild -w src/common -w src/backend -w src/web-index -w src/web-places --output build --transform 'src/*/{!(node_modules),node_modules/common}/**/*.{js,mjs}' --using scripts/transformer.js --fork scripts/gen-sql.js --fork build/backend/src/start.js -k 4000 -k 5555
scripts.build: npm run build-web && rebuild -w src --output build --transform 'src/*/{!(node_modules),node_modules/common}/**/*.{js,mjs}' --using scripts/transformer.js && rm -rf artifact && mkdir artifact && cp -r build/backend artifact/backend && rm -rf build/common/secrets && cp -r build/common artifact/common && cp -r build/web/dist artifact/backend/src/dist && cp prod.package.json artifact/package.json && cp -r .platform artifact/.platform && node scripts/link-common.js && npm run install-artifact && node scripts/zip.js
scripts.create-eb: eb create cobalt-prod-backend --sample --profile multiagent --instance-type t4g.micro --min-instance=1 --max-instances=1 --envvars $(node scripts/printEnvString.js)
scripts.deploy-eb: npm run build && eb deploy cobalt-prod-backend --profile multiagent
scripts.deploy-cdk: cdk bootstrap --profile multiagent && cdk deploy --profile multiagent
scripts.postinstall: npm run install-common && npm run install-mysql && npm run install-backend && npm run install-web
